verdict: A highly accurate and fun 120 BPM chart that is unfortunately dragged down by three physically impossible or awkward 3-panel jumps during holds.

issues.problem: The JUMP UR during a L hold creates a 3-panel chord that is extremely awkward to play on pad.
The JUMP LR during a D hold is physically impossible to hit with feet only without dropping the hold.
The JUMP LR during a D hold is physically impossible to hit with feet only without dropping the hold.
